🧡 Happy 6 Months 🧡

my favorite 🧡

To Angela 💌

with my whole heart

Angela,

I can't believe how fast these six months have gone by. They have been so wonderful — truly the best of my life. I am so thankful to have someone in my life that treats me as well as you do. I am so thankful for every single moment with you.

I have never felt so sure about anyone or anything ever than I am about you. Falling in love with you has been such a privilege. Everything in my life has gotten better since you have come into it.

Here's to 6 months, and every month after it. 🧡

— Love, Matt
🧡❤️🧡

Matt & Angela — September 2024 → Now ✨
